title: Maintenance Electrician cum Driver
description:
We are looking for a reliable and skilled Maintenance Electrician cum Driver to join our team. This dual-role position involves performing electrical, mechanical, and general maintenance across our facilities, as well as driving company vehicles to transport staff, goods, or spare parts. The ideal candidate is proactive, technically competent, safety-minded, and able to handle urgent tasks independently.

Key Responsibilities

Electrical & General Kitchen Maintenance

  • Maintain, troubleshoot, and repair kitchen equipment (noodle boilers, refrigerators, freezers, cookers, dishwashers, and other kitchen equipment).

  • Perform electrical works: wiring, switches, sockets, lighting, and fault rectification.

  • Conduct preventive maintenance to minimize breakdowns and operational downtime.

  • Manage breakdowns, repairs, and emergency requests across company outlets.

  • General repairs: painting, patching walls, doors, locks, fixtures, and minor plumbing tasks.

  • Air-conditioning maintenance: clean filters, check refrigerant, troubleshoot faults.

  • Document all repairs, faults, and system deficiencies.

  • Assist with furniture/equipment relocation when needed.

Driving & Logistics

  • Drive company vehicles safely for staff, goods, tools, and spare parts.

  • Ensure vehicles are clean, roadworthy, and well-maintained.

  • Purchase and collect spare parts promptly.

  • Comply with traffic laws and company driving policies.

Requirements

  • Valid Singapore Class 3 driving license (mandatory).

  • Licensed Electrician (LE) preferred (EMA requirements apply).

  • Experience with electrical, kitchen, and air-conditioning systems.

  • Physically fit: able to lift heavy items, use ladders/scaffolding, work at heights or confined areas.

  • Able to work independently, including evenings, weekends, and public holidays.

  • Strong work ethic: disciplined, reliable, accountable, and safety-conscious.

postedCompany.description:
Takagi Ramen, founded in 2015, is a growing FnB brand, currently with 8, 6 of which are 24hours, and a steady plan to open more outlets every year. 


We know that the backbone of our business is motivated, reliable staff who can work well under pressure so we are constantly coming up with new ways to reward our team members and create better job opportunities within our company for our staff.


Takagi-san’s vision for Takagi Ramen is to bring authentic, quality ramen at affordable prices to Singapore and to become a market leader for affordable Japanese ramen in Singapore. 


Our company also has a very active marketing arm under Takagi Agency which owns and manages the Facebook Page The Royal Singapore. This arm focuses on Digital Marketing through Video Content Creation.
postedCompany.name: TAKAGI RAMEN PTE. LTD.
